description_long: This street light features a tall, slender black pole with a slightly ornate base and a subtle midsection bulge, rising from a square, tiled platform. At the top, a classic lantern-style lamp head is mounted, characterized by its hexagonal shape, frosted glass panels, and gold trim. The lamp head is capped with a small, gold finial, adding a touch of elegance. The pole itself is mostly smooth with minimal decorative elements, focusing attention on the lamp head. The base appears robust and is designed to be securely anchored to the ground. This type of street light is commonly found in urban parks, sidewalks, or historic neighborhoods, providing both illumination and a decorative accent.
description: A tall, black street light with a classic hexagonal lantern head, gold trim, and a sturdy square base, ideal for urban or park settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate base, and the hexagonal lantern head with gold trim.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, revealing the same features but with a clearer look at the pole's midsection and lamp head symmetry.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, maintaining visibility of the lamp head and base details.
description_view_3: Back view, showing the rear of the lantern head and the pole, with all major features still visible.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic hexagonal lantern-style with frosted glass panels, gold trim, and a small gold finial on top.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Minimal; slight bulge at midsection and base, otherwise plain.
